description: Deliverable-quality control packs. A deliverable that declares a type inherits the type's required check set, so completeness is a property of this versioned library, not the authoring agent's memory. Every defect found once becomes a new line here (the ratchet). A typed deliverable that does not carry its type's enforcing evidence fails deliverable:audit.

web-image-asset.summary: A raster or vector image shipped to a web UI (logo, tile, illustration, social card).
web-image-asset.originDefect: A lender logo clipped at the canvas edge passed proxy metrics but violated the 'recognisable logo' intent (2026-06-15). The edge-clip check now catches this class deterministically.
